reasons: safety_check blocks conflicts, traversal, absolute paths, and generated/binary areas
no real installer writes were added

findings.issue: Safety checks are string-based and should use resolved paths before real writes.
findings.required_fix: Before/while implementing writes, resolve candidate paths under an explicit target root and reject paths outside it.

findings.issue: Dry-run in an already bootstrapped repo reports conflicts and safe=false, which may surprise users.
findings.required_fix: Eventually document expected conflict behavior more explicitly.

verification.tests: python -m unittest discover -s tests -v -> 124 tests OK

batch_decision.reason: First real write implementation should be narrow despite recent clean passes.

token_usage.reason: No latest Kimi token_count was provided for Round 014.
